exemplar.title: How can we know that current knowledge is an improvement upon past knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: How can we know that current knowledge is an improvement upon past knowledge?

strengths: The exhibition selects three well-defined, specific objects with clear real-world provenance (Business Insider graph, New Yorker article, NASA photograph).
Each object is linked to the IA prompt on improvement of knowledge, with most connections articulated and supported by evidence or citations.
The NASA Earth-from-space photograph provides a particularly strong visual counter-example, grounding abstract concepts in a compelling real-world context.
The student demonstrates academic rigor in several places, e.g., correct formatting of Michelson (2020) citation and effective provenance details for object sources.
weaknesses: Analyses of the vaccine development graph and flat-Earth example remain largely descriptive, lacking deeper TOK exploration (e.g., methodological paradigms, ways of knowing).
The My Lai whistle-blowing example contains factual inaccuracies (mislocating My Lai) and speculative causal claims about later legislation without sufficient evidence.
Support across objects is inconsistent: some points are well-referenced, while others rely on anecdote or unsupported assertion (e.g., flat-Earth quotations).
Bibliographic presentation is uneven, with duplicated sources, HTML artifacts, and inconsistent referencing style detracting from overall professionalism.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although strand assessments align most closely with band 5â6 based on uneven depth, factual slips, and occasional superficiality, the examinerâs award of 8 reflects recognition of strong object selection, clear real-world contexts, and generally effective links to the IA prompt. The student shows substantial engagement with the exhibition taskâthree distinct objects, credible provenance, and evidence-based justificationsâsufficient to merit the upper tier (band 7â8). The deficiencies in analytical precision and occasional inaccuracies are balanced by solid strengths in structure, sourcing, and relevance. Therefore, to align with the examinerâs final total and in view of the high-impact strengths, a score of 8/10 is justified.

annotations.comment: Clarify how this example specifically demonstrates an improvement in historical knowledge within the AOK History, perhaps by discussing criteria for truth in historical methodology.
The student effectively identifies the first object and its real-world context (Business Insider graph), providing a clear foundation for linking it to the IA prompt on knowledge improvement.

The analysis of procedural changes in vaccine development remains largely descriptive; the student should probe deeper into how fewer steps reflect shifts in methodological paradigms in scientific knowledge.
Consider expanding the TOK analysis by explaining how the visual representation of timelines can affect our perception of knowledge reliability and progress.
The statement on animal testing obsolescence is asserted without discussing its ethical implications or how it evidences an improvement in procedural versus ethical knowledge.
Incorporate ethical frameworks from TOK to discuss how the removal of animal testing steps represents an evolution in moral understanding of scientific practice.
The student clearly contextualizes the second object, stating its origin and author, which strengthens the link to historical knowledge production.
The location of My Lai is inaccurately given as Thailand; this factual error undermines the credibility of the historical claim.
Verify all historical and geographical facts in your commentary to ensure accuracy when presenting knowledge claims.
The causal link drawn between the My Lai whistleblowing and the 2020 Taxpayers Right-To-Know Act is speculative and lacks supporting historical evidence.
Provide specific legislative or archival sources to substantiate any causal claims about the impact of whistleblowing on later transparency laws.
Could the student distinguish more clearly between correlation and causation when linking events and subsequent laws?
The selection of the Earth-from-space photograph as the third object is well-anchored in its real-world context and contributes a strong visual counter-example.
The reliance on anecdotal flatâearth quotes is problematic; such selective testimony lacks scale and may not represent the broader community of knowers.
To strengthen the analysis, include empirical data on the prevalence of flatâearth beliefs to contextualize the epistemic bias discussed.
The commentary notes confirmation bias but does not explore TOK concepts like peer community or ways of knowing that sustain such biases.
Expand on how TOK frameworks (e.g., perception or language) explain why some knowers reject photographic evidence despite technological advancements.
How does the photograph function as an epistemic object in TOK terms, rather than merely serving as illustrative evidence?
The bibliography includes duplicated sources and inconsistent styling, which detracts from the academic rigor of the exhibition.
Standardize the referencing style (e.g., MLA or APA) across all entries to enhance professionalism and clarity.
Ensure every source cited in the text appears correctly in the bibliography and that URLs are complete and accessible.
The citation for Michelson (2020) is correctly formatted and supports the objectâs provenance effectively.
The footnote for the NASA photo contains HTML artifacts (â<sup>4</sup>â) likely due to OCR errors; this should be cleaned up.
Review OCR-generated tags and remove or correct any residual HTML markup in the final bibliography entries.
Link the concluding justification more explicitly back to the IA prompt to ensure each objectâs contribution remains focused on knowledge improvement.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
